queries.question: Show me the email address and field of study of all students with the first name Alice.
queries.sql: Select email, name from Student join Field_of_study on Student.field_of_study_id=Field_of_study.id where  full_name LIKE 'Alice %'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?email ?name WHERE {
  ?student a :Students .
  ?field_of_study a :Field_of_study .
  ?student p:hasField_of_study ?field_of_study .
  ?student p:email ?email .
  ?field_of_study p:name ?name .
  ?student p:name ?full_name_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?full_name_lk), "^Alice\\ .*$"))
}

queries.question: Show me the email address and degree program of all students with the first name Alice.
queries.sql: Select email, degree_name from Student join Degree_program on Student.Degree_program_id=Degree_program.id where  full_name LIKE 'Alice %'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?email ?degree_name WHERE {
  ?student a :Students .
  ?degree_program a :Degree_program .
  ?student p:hasDegree_program ?degree_program .
  ?student p:email ?email .
  ?degree_program p:degree_name ?degree_name .
  ?student p:name ?full_name_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?full_name_lk), "^Alice\\ .*$"))
}

queries.question: Show me the email address, field of study and degree program of all students with the first name Alice.
queries.sql: Select email, degree_name, name from Student join Field_of_study on Student.field_of_study_id=Field_of_study.id join Degree_program on Student.Degree_program_id=Degree_program.id where  full_name LIKE 'Alice %'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?email ?degree_name ?name WHERE {
  ?student a :Students .
  ?field_of_study a :Field_of_study .
  ?student p:hasField_of_study ?field_of_study .
  ?degree_program a :Degree_program .
  ?student p:hasDegree_program ?degree_program .
  ?student p:email ?email .
  ?degree_program p:degree_name ?degree_name .
  ?field_of_study p:name ?name .
  ?student p:name ?full_name_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?full_name_lk), "^Alice\\ .*$"))
}

queries.question: Show me students and their degree program.
queries.sql: Select full_name, degree_name from Student join Degree_program on Student.Degree_program_id=Degree_program.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?degree_name WHERE {
  ?student a :Students .
  ?degree_program a :Degree_program .
  ?student p:hasDegree_program ?degree_program .
  ?student p:name ?full_name .
  ?degree_program p:degree_name ?degree_name .
}

queries.question: Show me students and their field of study.
queries.sql: Select full_name, name from Student join Field_of_study on Student.field_of_study_id=Field_of_study.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?name WHERE {
  ?student a :Students .
  ?field_of_study a :Field_of_study .
  ?student p:hasField_of_study ?field_of_study .
  ?student p:name ?full_name .
  ?field_of_study p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Show me students and their field of study, as well as their degree program.
queries.sql: Select full_name, degree_name, name from Student join Field_of_study on Student.field_of_study_id=Field_of_study.id join Degree_program on Student.Degree_program_id=Degree_program.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?degree_name ?name WHERE {
  ?student a :Students .
  ?field_of_study a :Field_of_study .
  ?student p:hasField_of_study ?field_of_study .
  ?degree_program a :Degree_program .
  ?student p:hasDegree_program ?degree_program .
  ?student p:name ?full_name .
  ?degree_program p:degree_name ?degree_name .
  ?field_of_study p:name ?name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the email address of all students with the first name Alice and what they study.
Show the student's name and what they study
